title: gun.c jpt_weapon_bullet_type: Automatic Shotgun (AUTOSHOT) mis-grouped as pistol, diverges from retail shotgun_mine
repro: audit: asm_audit.py entry handles_firing_or_throwing_weapon_in_hand (rank 2); diff jpt_weapon_bullet_type[weapon_id-4] handlers vs switch(item)

history.note: ASM jpt_weapon_bullet_type (gun.c:7076, dispatch gun.c:8696 idx=weapon_id-4, bounds<0x14). Handlers: weapon_bullet_type_pistol calls sub_GAME_7F061BF4(hand)+field_0x30++ then falls to common tail; weapon_bullet_type_shotgun_mine does NEITHER (straight to tail); weapon_bullet_type_none calls sub_GAME_7F061BF4 only. ASM maps SHOTGUN(idx11) AND AUTOSHOT(idx12) both to shotgun_mine (no pre-tail action). The live C switch(item) (gun.c:6961) correctly leaves SHOTGUN empty but places AUTOSHOT in the pistol case (sub_GAME_7F061BF4 + hp->field_8A0++), so the port applies pistol recoil/shot-count to the Automatic Shotgun that retail does not. LASER/WATCHLASER (none) match. Found by S-tier Task 2.4 ASM-audit pilot #2. Do not fix from this note; re-derive from ASM.

jpt_weapon_bullet_type[12]=shotgun_mine for AUTOSHOT (like SHOTGUN[11]); C put AUTOSHOT in pistol case (sub_GAME_7F061BF4 + field_8A0++). Reachable: AUTOSHOT fires via guns->state2->pistol, latches weapon_firing_status each shot.
Factor weaponBulletTypeClassify() (src/platform/weapon_bullet_type.c) encoding retail table; AUTOSHOT->SHOTGUN_MINE default; GE007_NO_AUTOSHOT_BULLETTYPE_FIX legacy control.

Fix landed. CTest weapon_bullet_type PASS with fix (AUTOSHOT->shotgun_mine); FAILS on revert (AUTOSHOT->pistol at default): 'FAIL: AUTOSHOT (fix) -> shotgun_mine, not pistol'. Legacy flag GE007_NO_AUTOSHOT_BULLETTYPE_FIX byte-identical. gun.o + globbed weapon_bullet_type.o compile clean.
